# Safe Wording Matrix

| Risky wording | Safer wording |
|---|---|
| “They committed fraud” | “The regulator alleged...” or “The DOJ said...” |
| “This proves everyone is fake” | “This illustrates how a signal can be engineered” |
| “The algorithm was tricked” | “The campaign may have distorted the signals used by recommendation systems” |
| “This company is guilty” | “The case is contested; the company denied the allegations” |
| “This tactic works by...” | “At a research level, the observed pattern involves...” |
| “Do this to grow” | “A researcher should look for this red flag” |
| “Bots are used to...” | “Some enforcement sources identify automated activity as a form of artificial metric inflation” |
